category_sources: source_facts.description says htpdate synchronizes time with remote web servers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives htpdate; current_curation.display-name also gives htpdate.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official htpdate homepage; source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies synchronization with remote web servers; current_curation.tags includes cli.
